allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach\($p in @\("fire_bolt","dark_bolt"\)\){ $f="c:\\Dev\\web-rts-nomads\\client\\src\\game-portal\\src\\assets\\projectiles\\$p\\sprite.png"; if\(Test-Path $f\){ $i=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f\); "${p} sprite.png = $\($i.Width\)x$\($i.Height\)"; $i.Dispose\(\) } else { "${p} = NO sprite.png" } })
